title: TUI event loop has no cancellation signal for in-flight API tasks at quit
description:
## Severity
Major
## Dimension
concurrency
## Location
src/tui/app.rs:526-589, 1488-1557
## Violation
The run() event loop terminates when should_quit is true and breaks immediately. Background tasks from spawn_api_turn keep running with no cancellation signal — tools mid-execution have no way to know the user quit.

The agentic follow-up loop in run_api_turn_async (line 1518) has no cancellation token. A 25-iteration agentic chain continues billing the user's API account after quit.

## Mandated refactor
Add tokio_util::sync::CancellationToken on App, cloned into ApiTurnParams. run_api_turn_async checks token.is_cancelled() each iteration. pipeline::run_turn races against token.cancelled(). On should_quit, cancel token before breaking the loop; await spawned tasks up to 2s before tearing down.

## Filed from QA review dispatch
